summary: Full e2e testing of Influencer Connect MVP. Backend: 11/13 tests passed. Frontend: All pages loading correctly with proper auth, dark navy theme, and all required features.

minor.issue: Endpoint does not require authentication (returns 200 without Bearer token). Low risk since data is read-only demo data.
Endpoint path is /api/analytics/overview not /api/analytics - test updated accordingly. Actual endpoint works fine.

issues: Some creator images appear to be stock photos not specifically relevant to the influencer niche (e.g., some yoga/camera images shown for 'Fashion & Lifestyle' niche). Minor visual inconsistency.

action_items: Consider adding auth requirement to GET /api/influencers endpoint for security (currently public)
Analytics endpoint is /api/analytics/overview not /api/analytics - ensure frontend uses correct path
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/influencers has no auth dependency - if influencer data should be brand-private, add Depends(get_current_user)
Analytics route is /analytics/overview not /analytics - frontend page likely calls the correct path but worth verifying
seed_data_creation: Re-created test user and session via mongosh. 20 influencers confirmed in DB. 2 campaigns for test user (TEST_Campaign_e2e created during test, Summer Glow Collection seeded).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All pages load correctly with injected session cookie. Backend APIs working. Key findings: (1) /api/influencers is public (no auth required). (2) Analytics endpoint is /api/analytics/overview. (3) All 7 Kanban stages shown in Campaign Pipeline. (4) Campaign Wizard has 4 steps: Brand Details, Audience & Goals, Platforms & Tone, AI Processing. (5) AI Scoring button visible on Discovery page with campaign dropdown.
mocked_integrations: Apify, Jasper.ai, lemlist, HeyGen, Gumloop, Attio, Tidio, Fireflies.ai, Texts.com, Northbeam, OpusClip shown as 'Demo' in Settings integrations grid. Claude Sonnet 4.5 and Stripe are shown as 'Active'. Analytics data is simulated server-side.
